member.name: T:Prime.SimbaService.Configuration
member.summary: Holds the simba´s configuration.

member.name: P:Prime.SimbaService.Configuration.IsSimbaEnabled
member.summary: Gets or sets a value indicating whether Simba is on or off..

member.name: P:Prime.SimbaService.Configuration.OperatingType
member.summary: Gets or sets the operation type. This should match with the one given by the Ulat file on the .

member.name: P:Prime.SimbaService.Configuration.ActiveUlatUnitIdMethod
member.summary: Gets or sets the unit id.

member.name: P:Prime.SimbaService.Configuration.SsidKey
member.summary: Gets or sets the ssid key.

member.name: P:Prime.SimbaService.Configuration.UlatFilePath
member.summary: Gets or sets the ulat file path.

member.name: P:Prime.SimbaService.Configuration.UlatFileRevision
member.summary: Gets or sets the ulat file revision.

member.name: P:Prime.SimbaService.Configuration.InstancesPerModule
member.summary: Gets or sets the instances per module.

member.name: P:Prime.SimbaService.Configuration.InstancesToBypassPerConfigSet
member.summary: Gets or sets the test instances to bypass per config set.

member.name: P:Prime.SimbaService.Configuration.ProcessTypes
member.summary: Gets or sets the test instances to bypass per config set.

member.name: P:Prime.SimbaService.Configuration.ActiveProcessType
member.summary: Gets or sets the active process type.

member.name: P:Prime.SimbaService.Configuration.UlatFileType
member.summary: Gets or sets the "de-facto" ulat type of the loaded file. This should match with the one provided by the user on the .

member.name: M:Prime.SimbaService.Configuration.ClearBypassData
member.summary: Clears the current bypass data.

member.name: T:Prime.SimbaService.DataLoader.InputFactory
member.summary: Class for handling different input file formats.

member.name: M:Prime.SimbaService.DataLoader.InputFactory.CreateConfigHandler(System.String)
member.summary: Creates an object that implements the IParser interface.
member.param: Path to the input file we're validating.

member.name: T:Prime.SimbaService.DataLoader.IParser
member.summary: Interface for Simba Parser.

member.name: M:Prime.SimbaService.DataLoader.IParser.ParseConfigFile``1(System.String)
member.summary: Loads configuration from file.
member.typeparam: Type of which to deserialize the input file into.
member.returns: The configuration object of type T.

member.name: T:Prime.SimbaService.ISimbaService
member.summary: Interface for Simba calls from TestMethods.

member.name: M:Prime.SimbaService.ISimbaService.LoadTestProgramInstances(Prime.SessionService.ISessionContextProviderContainer)
member.summary: Loads the test program instances.
member.param: The session context of this operation.

member.name: M:Prime.SimbaService.ISimbaService.Disable(Prime.SessionService.ISessionContextProviderContainer)
member.summary: Turn off Simba and clean every previous data.
member.param: The session context of this operation.

member.name: M:Prime.SimbaService.ISimbaService.PrintSimbaLotToItuff(Prime.SessionService.ISessionContextProviderContainer)
member.summary: Prints Simba bypass Lot header to ITUFF. Must be called in LotStart.
member.param: The session context of this operation.

member.name: M:Prime.SimbaService.ISimbaService.EnableInstanceBypass(Prime.SessionService.ISessionContextProviderContainer)
member.summary: Enables simba bypass. Must be called in Device Start.
member.param: The session context of this operation.

member.name: M:Prime.SimbaService.ISimbaService.DisableInstanceBypass(Prime.SessionService.ISessionContextProviderContainer)
member.summary: Disables simba bypass. Must be called in Device End.
member.param: The session context of this operation.

member.name: M:Prime.SimbaService.ISimbaService.CheckInstanceBypass(System.String,Prime.SessionService.ISessionContextProviderContainer)
member.summary: Check if current test instance is to be bypassed via Simba.
member.param: Name of currently running test instance.
The session context of this operation.

member.summary: Sets up the Simba service for sort.

member.summary: Sets up the Simba service for class.
member.param: The SSID key for ULT data.

member.summary: Represents the Simba service.

member.param: The SSID key for ULT data.

member.summary: Sets up the Simba service for sort.

member.name: M:Prime.SimbaService.ISimba.IsInstanceBypass(System.String,Prime.SessionService.ISessionContextProviderContainer)
member.summary: Checks if the instance is bypassed.
member.returns: True if the instance is bypassed, otherwise false.

member.name: M:Prime.SimbaService.ISimba.GetLotLevelStringToPrint(Prime.SessionService.ISessionContextProviderContainer)
member.summary: Gets the lot level string to print.
member.returns: The lot level string to print.

member.name: M:Prime.SimbaService.ISimba.OnDeviceStarted(Prime.SessionService.ISessionContextProviderContainer)
member.summary: Executes when the device is started.

member.name: M:Prime.SimbaService.SimbaClass.SetupLotUlatData(Prime.SessionService.ISessionContextProviderContainer)
member.summary: Pushes ULAT data into Shared Storage for lot operation mode. Must be called in INIT flow by test instance.
member.param: The session context of this operation.

member.name: M:Prime.SimbaService.SimbaClass.SetupUnitUlatData(Prime.SimbaService.UlatUnitIdMethod,System.String,Prime.SessionService.ISessionContextProviderContainer)
member.summary: Pushes ULAT data into Shared Storage for unit operation mode. Must be called in INIT flow by test instance.
member.param: Used to access ULT/efuse data stored by FuseRead.
The session context of this operation.

member.name: T:Prime.SimbaService.TestInstanceProcessor
member.summary: Class with helpers on test instance related requirements.

member.name: M:Prime.SimbaService.TestInstanceProcessor.IsPrime(System.String)
member.summary: Returns true if the given test class name is a Prime test class.
member.param: The name of the test class to process.
member.returns: If is a prime test class.

member.name: M:Prime.SimbaService.TestInstanceProcessor.SplitInstanceName(System.String)
member.summary: Returns result of spliting the given instance name in the module name (including the IP) and the instance name.
member.param: The name of the test instance to process.
member.returns: The split test instance name in module and instance name.
member.exception: If the given test instance name doesn't match the expected format.

member.name: T:Prime.SimbaService.UnitInfo
member.summary: Unit's simba info.

member.name: F:Prime.SimbaService.UnitInfo.FSMModes
member.summary: Uservar token used In SORT contains the per instance alias predictions populated by DPC automation. The predictions provided by tulip script.

member.name: F:Prime.SimbaService.UnitInfo.WasDieTestedUserVar
member.summary: Uservar token Used in SORT to indicate to Simba if currently running die is already tested.

member.name: M:Prime.SimbaService.UnitInfo.WasCurrentDieTested
member.summary: Returns if current die was already tested.
